case_title: TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATION VS. ALBERTO V VALDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100008653)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEZ, ALBERTO V DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-13-2015
NOTICE OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE; (TRANSACTION ID # 100003458) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATION SERVED JUL-24-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VALDEZ, ALBERTO V
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF SEAN D. MORRISSEY, ESQ. IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 100003638) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOYOTA MOTOR CREDIT CORPORATION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2015 CONTINUED TO DEC-01-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE SEP-01-2015 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-01-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
